pr.title: Add Replit Agent prompt for full QA, bug hunt, and responsive optimization
pr.body:
### Motivation
- Provide an execution-ready prompt for a Replit Agent to run final QA, bug-hunting, responsiveness and performance slimming prior to MVP launch. 
- Make the plan review-ready so a second agent/reviewer can approve and then execute the checklist and deliverables.

### Description
- Add `REPLIT_NEXT_STEPS_PROMPT.md` at the repository root containing phased instructions: Baseline & environment validation, End-to-end functional QA, Responsive/mobile polish, Performance & bundle slimming, Data integrity, and Regression suite. 
- The prompt includes concrete breakpoints, per-page checks, required automated tests to add, deliverables (issue log, responsive audit matrix, performance diff, production checklist), and a final go/no-go recommendation. 
- This is a documentation-only change and does not modify runtime code or assets.

### Testing
- No automated tests were required because this is a documentation-only change. 
- Confirmed the `REPLIT_NEXT_STEPS_PROMPT.md` file is present and readable in the repository.

------
[Codex Task](https://chatgpt.com/codex/cloud/tasks/task_e_69eb7dfeb24883239cb6aa90c378ccb3)
pr.author: capituu
